meta.title: BMW 750e Engine Replacement Cost UK — Compare Quotes
meta.description: Every BMW 750e engine — B58 petrol and hybrid system. G70 generation, real UK costs and reliability. Get free quotes from 20+ vetted BMW specialists today.

mainEntity.name: How much does a BMW 750e engine replacement cost in the UK?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned B58 engine for the 750e typically costs £6,000–£9,000 supply only. Fitting adds £1,200–£1,800. The hybrid system components (battery, electric motor) are additional costs if they need replacement. Main dealer new engines can exceed £22,000.

The B58 petrol engine is rated ★★★★☆ — it's one of BMW's most reliable modern engines. However, the 750e's plug-in hybrid system adds complexity: battery degradation is expected over time, and electric motor cooling issues can occur. The B58 itself is well-proven and reliable.

mainEntity.name: What are the common problems with the BMW 750e?

acceptedAnswer.text: Battery degradation (range loss), electric motor and charging system issues, and B58 cooling system failures are the most common. The B58 itself is reliable, but the hybrid system demands specialist attention.

mainEntity.name: Is it worth replacing a BMW 750e engine, or should I scrap the car?

acceptedAnswer.text: Against a £60,000–£100,000+ 750e, a £7,500 recon engine is a manageable 7–12% of the vehicle's value — worth it. Given the G70's strong retained values, replacement is almost always viable. However, if the hybrid battery also needs replacement (£8,000–£15,000), assess carefully.

mainEntity.name: How do I find my BMW 750e engine code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Listed on the VIN plate and vehicle documentation. The 750e uses the B58 3.0-litre petrol engine combined with an electric motor. The badge signifies the plug-in hybrid model. Tell us your registration date and we'll confirm it for free.

mainEntity.name: Can I repair the 750e's hybrid battery, or does it need a new engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: The hybrid battery is separate from the engine. Cell-level replacement or module replacement is possible, costing £3,000–£6,000. If the entire battery pack needs replacement, it's significantly more expensive (£8,000–£15,000). BMW's 8-year/100,000-mile battery warranty provides some protection.

buyingChecks.title: Buying This 750e? Check These First
buyIf: * Full BMW service history with documented oil-change intervals
* Battery health report available — check capacity against new (aim for >85% of original)
* Evidence of regular charging and use — hybrid systems prefer regular operation
* Low-mileage example with full running-in service completed
avoidIf: * Drivetrain warning lights with no diagnosis
* Significantly reduced electric range compared to new (below 70% of original)
* No service history — the B58 is reliable but the hybrid system demands maintenance
* Charging issues — the car won't charge or takes significantly longer than expected

repairBuyOrReplace.closingVerdict: The 750e is BMW's flagship plug-in hybrid, combining the proven B58 inline-six with an efficient electric motor. The B58 itself is one of BMW's most reliable engines, but the hybrid system adds complexity. Buy on battery health and service history — this is a premium vehicle that demands premium care.

buyingChecklist.intro: Before you buy a used BMW 750e (or before you commit to an engine replacement), check these:
items: * Battery Health — What is the current electric range compared to new? Check the battery health report
* Cold Start — Listen for any rattle on startup (timing chain wear — very rare on B58)
* Service History — Including B58 engine maintenance and hybrid system checks
* Charging System — Does the car charge correctly? Any error messages?
* Drivetrain Warning — Any warning lights on the dash? Have codes been read?
* Electric Range — Test the electric range in real conditions; significant loss indicates battery degradation
* Regenerative Braking — Does it function correctly? Any unusual noises from the transmission?
* MOT History — Check for emissions-related failures; the B58 should pass easily if well-maintained
